ab: Slaqi ku han we mneniq ku alang Gluban, mmaha ku muuyas sapah pyasan de, mosa ku meniq Taycong di, kika meniq ku naq Taycong hiya di.
ch: 小時候我們家住在清流部落，上學以後，就搬到了臺中，一直在都市裡生活。
en: When we were young, our family lived in Gluban. After I started school, we moved to Taichung and have been living in the city ever since.

ab: muuyas ku ta-se de, mnsluhe ku kingl sslhayan kesun gaya nSeediq, kika klaun mu mesa lmlamu bale ka gaya dSeediq Taywang nii.
ch: 上了大學以後，我修了一堂關於原住民文化的課程，瞭解到臺灣原住民族有各式各樣豐富的文化。
en: After I went to college, I took a course on aboriginal culture and learned that the aboriginal people in Taiwan have various and rich cultures.

ab: so kiya de, gdregan laqi muuyas rbagan knii, maha miyan qmita ma smiling drudan alang, anu mkmlela nami gaya miyan naq Seediq.
ch: 因此，今年暑假時，我和哥哥回到部落訪問老人家，想要瞭解自己族群的文化。
en: So this summer, my brother and I went back to our tribe to visit the elderly, hoping to understand the culture of our own ethnic group.

ab: mmsepac kmxalan ka knkawas na rudan mu sapah hii di, ani si so hari knriso ka qtaun dungan.
ch: 老人家已經八十歲了，但是看起來還像中年人。
en: The old man is already eighty years old, but he still looks like a middle-aged man.

ab: slingun mu mesa mkela su mrengo kari maanu dungan ka heya, mkela riyung mrengo kari miyan Seediq ka heya ma, mkela mrengo kari Tayal, kari Plmukan ma, kari Tanah Tunux duri.
ch: 我問他會哪些語言，他的賽德克語說得很流利，也會說泰雅語、閩南語和日本話。
en: I asked him which languages he knew, and he was fluent in Seediq, as well as Tayal, Hokkien and Japanese.

ab: smniling ku heya de kika klaun mu di, kela naq smnluhe kari Tanah Tunux slaqi ka heya ma, weewa Tayal ka qedil na, meniq so qqpahun na duri we, egu klaun na Khilan dungan, kika egu klegan ka kari klaun na mrengo.
ch: 我問他才知道，原來他小時候就學日本話，太太是泰雅族人，而他工作上認識許多閩南人，所以他會說這麼多語言。
en: I asked him to find out that he learned Japanese when he was a child, his wife is an Atayal, and he knows many Hokkien at work, so he can speak so many languages.

ab: mpprengo nami ciida we, eguw bale ka rnungagan na quri pphuling ma tmlenga ka rudan snlingan miyan.
ch: 我們訪談的時候，老人家談論了許多關於狩獵的傳統知識。
en: During our interview, the old man talked about a lot of traditional knowledge about hunting.

ab: ani miyan naq ini hari klai qmbahang we, wada nami hii saangal qnawan ddilun ka kari na ma, wada nami ru-ing duri, blequn nami qmbhang bobo na dungan.
ch: 雖然我們沒有辦法完全聽懂，但是我們有用手機錄影，可以再仔細聆聽。
en: Although we could’t fully understand it, we could record it on our cell phones and listen to it more.

ab: slaqi ku han we ini ku kela gaya nami naq Seediq, msiqa ku bale qnSeediq mu naq.
ch: 小時候我不瞭解自己族群的文化，對於自己是原住民有點不好意思。
en: When I was young, I didn’t understand the culture of my ethnic group, and I was a little embarrassed that I was an aborigine.

ab: kndudul eguw ka klaun mu di we, kika mkela ku mesa yami Seediq we ini ba pntena ma, qrasun mu bale.
ch: 瞭解愈多以後，愈覺得自己身為賽德克族人，是很獨特的，也很值得驕傲。
en: The more I know, the more I feel that being a Seediq is unique and something to be proud of.
